headline: This Monday demands discipline—no weekend relapse today
summary: You're 0.49 kg/week short of pace; today's structured eating and cardio are non-negotiable to begin catching up.
details: Start now: use Huel for at least two meals, avoid snacking entirely, and stay under your daily kilojoule target. Hit the rowing machine or treadmill for 40 minutes today—no shortcuts. This Monday sets the tone for the week; build momentum today so you don't carry weekend patterns into another deficit.
